source: STATE_Roman.md — HARD STOPS (never override without explicit re-discussion)
note: Machine-checkable copy of the hard stops. STATE_Roman.md remains authoritative; regenerate/curate this when the hard-stop list changes. 'requiresInStack' rules only fire as a hard stop when the named counterpart is in data/stack.json; otherwise they surface as a forward-looking note.

rules.summary: No Dihexa + IGF-1 LR3 together (oncogenic synergy: HGF/c-Met + IGF-1)
rules.note: Vault Dihexa while IGF-1 is active. IGF-1 cycle ends ~Jun 12.

rules.summary: No 9-Me-BC, MAOIs, or unclear serotonergics (serotonin-syndrome risk with sertraline 150mg)
No Cerebrolysin / Cerebroprotein Hydrolysate via SubQ/IM (IV-only product)
rules.note: SubQ/IM creates an immunogenic depot. Vault for IV (dilute 250mL NS over 60-120 min) or discard.

rules.summary: No ACE-031 / non-selective ActRIIB binders (BMP9/10 endothelial toxicity — class issue)
rules.note: Conditional hold; if ever run, low-dose SubQ with canary monitoring (epistaxis/gum bleed/telangiectasia = STOP). Never with FLRG242.

rules.summary: CJC-1295 is NO-DAC only — never with DAC
rules.note: No-DAC preserves the pulsatile pattern; DAC produces sustained IGF-1 elevation (avoided).

rules.summary: No high-dose oral L-carnitine (TMAO via gut FMO3)
rules.note: ALCAR / injectable substitute if a carnitine effect is wanted.

rules.summary: No Nefiracetam (testicular toxicity — conflicts with HCG/Leydig preservation)
rules.note: HCG is part of the standing protocol.

rules.summary: No Metatrutide (glucagon AMPK activation vs anabolic mTOR — incoherent)
rules.note: Distinct from retatrutide; do not confuse.

rules.summary: Injectable glutathione IM/SubQ is low-yield (γ-GT degrades plasma GSH); IV is the effective route
rules.note: Efficacy-based stop. User accepts the low yield and RUNS SubQ/IM 1200mg 2-3x/wk as an antioxidant-gap closer; IV is the upgrade. Flag, don't block.

rules.summary: TrkB-downregulation vault (Dihexa, Semax NA, Selank NA, Adalank, Adamax, Noopept) + VIP/Orexin-A paused
rules.note: Policy REVISED: blanket vault -> cycled use (4wk on / 2-4wk off) via Neurolux, which consolidates the TrkB group. Dihexa remains vaulted under rule #2 while IGF-1 is active.

rules.summary: Always keep HCG with TRT — never extended TRT without it
Confirm injection route matches manufacturer instructions for any unfamiliar peptide
rules.note: Route mismatch (e.g. IV-only product given SubQ) is a recurring failure mode — see rule #4.
